title: 2016-2019 Lexus RX350 RX450h Electric Parking Brake EPB Release - Rear Brake Service Mode
description: Master Technician Viktor G shows the DIY how-to procedure to fully retract the parking brake using a 12 volt battery in order to be able to complete the rear brake pad replacement.

items.name: Retractable test leads to supply battery power from your vehicle battery
Small wire brushes for cleaning the connector
Compressed air duster to clean the dirty off
1/2" drive cordless DeWALT impact wrench kit to take the wheels off
1/2" torque wrench for tightening the wheels
Autel bidirectional scan tool that I use myself
